app.title: Poson Route Guidance
app.subtitle: Anuradhapura · Sri Lanka Police
app.offlineBanner: Offline — data may be outdated. Last updated {{time}}.

places.title: Dansal & Services
places.subtitle: All food, drink, water & medical points

home.pickDestination: Where do you want to go?
home.searchPlaceholder: Search a place or tap the map
home.tapMapHint: Tap a marker or the map to set your destination

route.noRoute: No legal one-way route to this destination right now.
route.noRouteHint: A road may be closed or one-way against you. Try the nearest reachable exit.
route.farFromNetwork: You are outside the route zone.
route.farHint: Head to the nearest entry point shown on the map, then tap GO again.
route.rerouted: Your route changed — a road ahead was closed.
route.viaEntry: This stop is reached via the one-way route. Head to {{name}} first, then follow this route.

dansal.title: Dansal along the route
dansal.none: No active Dansal on this route.

parking.title: Parking along the route
parking.none: No parking listed on this route.

report.title: Report a problem
report.placeholder: Describe the issue (wrong direction, blocked road, etc.)
report.thanks: Thank you. Your report was sent to the Police control room.
report.locationNote: Your current location is attached to help us respond.

disclaimer: Follow Police officers and on-site signs at all times. This guide reflects the official one-way plan but conditions can change.

editor.title: Map Editor
editor.segmentFrom: Pick the FROM junction, then trace the road, then pick the TO junction.
editor.segmentDirection: Direction: traffic flows FROM → TO only.

validate.title: Network Validation
validate.allGood: All checks passed. Network is safe to publish.
validate.unreachable: Entry point cannot reach any exit: {{name}}

data.title: Backup & Restore
data.importWarn: This replaces the road network (junctions & roads) with the imported file. Dansal & parking are kept unless the file includes them. Continue?

backup.exportHint: Download all junctions, roads, Dansal and parking as a JSON backup.
backup.importHint: Restore from a JSON file. Roads & junctions are replaced; Dansal & parking are kept unless the file includes them.
backup.importError: Couldn't read that file. Make sure it's a valid network JSON export.
